description: Trend graphs. Adjust the time range as needed.

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /pv[1-4]_power/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "PV Total":
        (if exists r.pv1_power then r.pv1_power else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.pv2_power then r.pv2_power else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.pv3_power then r.pv3_power else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.pv4_power then r.pv4_power else 0.0)
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /pv[1-4]_power/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "PV1 (PowMr)":   if exists r.pv1_power then r.pv1_power else 0.0,
      "PV2 (PowMr)":   if exists r.pv2_power then r.pv2_power else 0.0,
      "PV3 (Growatt)": if exists r.pv3_power then r.pv3_power else 0.0,
      "PV4 (Growatt)": if exists r.pv4_power then r.pv4_power else 0.0
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /^pv[1-4]_voltage$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "PV1 (PowMr)":   if exists r.pv1_voltage then r.pv1_voltage else 0.0,
      "PV2 (PowMr)":   if exists r.pv2_voltage then r.pv2_voltage else 0.0,
      "PV3 (Growatt)": if exists r.pv3_voltage then r.pv3_voltage else 0.0,
      "PV4 (Growatt)": if exists r.pv4_voltage then r.pv4_voltage else 0.0
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /^pv[1-4]_current$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "PV1 (PowMr)":   if exists r.pv1_current then r.pv1_current else 0.0,
      "PV2 (PowMr)":   if exists r.pv2_current then r.pv2_current else 0.0,
      "PV3 (Growatt)": if exists r.pv3_current then r.pv3_current else 0.0,
      "PV4 (Growatt)": if exists r.pv4_current then r.pv4_current else 0.0
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /load_active_l[12]/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Load L1": if exists r.load_active_l1 then r.load_active_l1 else 0.0,
      "Load L2": if exists r.load_active_l2 then r.load_active_l2 else 0.0,
      "Load Total":
        (if exists r.load_active_l1 then r.load_active_l1 else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.load_active_l2 then r.load_active_l2 else 0.0)
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /grid_l[12]$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Grid L1": if exists r.grid_l1 then r.grid_l1 else 0.0,
      "Grid L2": if exists r.grid_l2 then r.grid_l2 else 0.0,
      "Grid Total":
        (if exists r.grid_l1 then r.grid_l1 else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.grid_l2 then r.grid_l2 else 0.0)
  }))

panels.title: Grid Power — L1 / L2 / Total  (+ = import)

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /^(grid_voltage_l[12]|inverter_voltage_l[12])$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Grid L1":     if exists r.grid_voltage_l1     then r.grid_voltage_l1     else 0.0,
      "Grid L2":     if exists r.grid_voltage_l2     then r.grid_voltage_l2     else 0.0,
      "Inverter L1": if exists r.inverter_voltage_l1 then r.inverter_voltage_l1 else 0.0,
      "Inverter L2": if exists r.inverter_voltage_l2 then r.inverter_voltage_l2 else 0.0
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /^(grid_frequency|inverter_frequency)$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Grid":     if exists r.grid_frequency     then r.grid_frequency     else 0.0,
      "Inverter": if exists r.inverter_frequency then r.inverter_frequency else 0.0
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "battery_soc")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, "SOC (%)": r._value}))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name =~ /^battery_voltage_(powmr|growatt)$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Battery V (PowMr)":  if exists r.battery_voltage_powmr  then r.battery_voltage_powmr  else 0.0,
      "Battery V (Growatt)": if exists r.battery_voltage_growatt then r.battery_voltage_growatt else 0.0
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r.name =~ /battery_current_powmr/ or
    r.name =~ /battery_current_growatt_(charge|draw)/
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      c_powmr   = if exists r.battery_current_powmr            then -float(v: r.battery_current_powmr) else 0.0
      c_growatt = if exists r.battery_current_growatt_charge and exists r.battery_current_growatt_draw
                  then float(v: r.battery_current_growatt_charge) - float(v: r.battery_current_growatt_draw)
                  else 0.0
      return {
        _time: r._time,
        "Current PowMr":  c_powmr,
        "Current Growatt": c_growatt,
        "Current Total":   c_powmr + c_growatt
      }
  })

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r.name =~ /battery_(voltage|current)_powmr/ or
    r.name =~ /battery_voltage_growatt/ or
    r.name =~ /battery_current_growatt_(charge|draw)/
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      p_powmr   = if exists r.battery_voltage_powmr and exists r.battery_current_powmr
                  then -float(v: r.battery_voltage_powmr) * float(v: r.battery_current_powmr)
                  else 0.0
      p_growatt = if exists r.battery_voltage_growatt and exists r.battery_current_growatt_charge and exists r.battery_current_growatt_draw
                  then float(v: r.battery_voltage_growatt) *
                       (float(v: r.battery_current_growatt_charge) - float(v: r.battery_current_growatt_draw))
                  else 0.0
      return {
        _time: r._time,
        "Power PowMr":  p_powmr,
        "Power Growatt": p_growatt,
        "Power Total":   p_powmr + p_growatt
      }
  })

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "pv_powmr_daily" or r.name == "pv3_daily" or r.name == "pv4_daily")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "PV PowMr Daily":   if exists r.pv_powmr_daily then r.pv_powmr_daily else 0.0,
      "PV3 Daily (Growatt)": if exists r.pv3_daily then r.pv3_daily else 0.0,
      "PV4 Daily (Growatt)": if exists r.pv4_daily then r.pv4_daily else 0.0,
      "Total PV Daily":
        (if exists r.pv_powmr_daily then r.pv_powmr_daily else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.pv3_daily then r.pv3_daily else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.pv4_daily then r.pv4_daily else 0.0)
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "batt_charge_daily" or r.name == "batt_discharge_daily" or r.name == "batt_charge_daily_growatt" or r.name == "batt_discharge_daily_growatt")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Charge Daily (PowMr)":   if exists r.batt_charge_daily then r.batt_charge_daily else 0.0,
      "Charge Daily (Growatt)": if exists r.batt_charge_daily_growatt then r.batt_charge_daily_growatt else 0.0,
      "Charge Daily (Total)":
        (if exists r.batt_charge_daily then r.batt_charge_daily else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.batt_charge_daily_growatt then r.batt_charge_daily_growatt else 0.0),
      "Discharge Daily (PowMr)":   if exists r.batt_discharge_daily then r.batt_discharge_daily else 0.0,
      "Discharge Daily (Growatt)": if exists r.batt_discharge_daily_growatt then r.batt_discharge_daily_growatt else 0.0,
      "Discharge Daily (Total)":
        (if exists r.batt_discharge_daily then r.batt_discharge_daily else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.batt_discharge_daily_growatt then r.batt_discharge_daily_growatt else 0.0)
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "load_daily" or r.name == "grid_to_batt_daily" or r.name == "grid_to_load_daily")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Load Daily": if exists r.load_daily then r.load_daily else 0.0,
      "Grid to Battery Daily": if exists r.grid_to_batt_daily then r.grid_to_batt_daily else 0.0,
      "Grid to Load Daily": if exists r.grid_to_load_daily then r.grid_to_load_daily else 0.0,
      "Total Grid Import Daily": (if exists r.grid_to_batt_daily then r.grid_to_batt_daily else 0.0) + (if exists r.grid_to_load_daily then r.grid_to_load_daily else 0.0)
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "pv_cumulative" or r.name == "pv3_cumulative" or r.name == "pv4_cumulative" or r.name == "load_cumulative")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "PV PowMr Total":  if exists r.pv_cumulative then r.pv_cumulative else 0.0,
      "PV3 Total (Growatt)": if exists r.pv3_cumulative then r.pv3_cumulative else 0.0,
      "PV4 Total (Growatt)": if exists r.pv4_cumulative then r.pv4_cumulative else 0.0,
      "PV Total":
        (if exists r.pv_cumulative then r.pv_cumulative else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.pv3_cumulative then r.pv3_cumulative else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.pv4_cumulative then r.pv4_cumulative else 0.0),
      "Load Total": if exists r.load_cumulative then r.load_cumulative else 0.0
  }))

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "batt_charge_cumulative" or r.name == "batt_discharge_cumulative" or r.name == "batt_charge_cumulative_growatt" or r.name == "batt_discharge_cumulative_growatt")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Charge (PowMr)":   if exists r.batt_charge_cumulative then r.batt_charge_cumulative else 0.0,
      "Charge (Growatt)": if exists r.batt_charge_cumulative_growatt then r.batt_charge_cumulative_growatt else 0.0,
      "Charge Total":
        (if exists r.batt_charge_cumulative then r.batt_charge_cumulative else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.batt_charge_cumulative_growatt then r.batt_charge_cumulative_growatt else 0.0),
      "Discharge (PowMr)":   if exists r.batt_discharge_cumulative then r.batt_discharge_cumulative else 0.0,
      "Discharge (Growatt)": if exists r.batt_discharge_cumulative_growatt then r.batt_discharge_cumulative_growatt else 0.0,
      "Discharge Total":
        (if exists r.batt_discharge_cumulative then r.batt_discharge_cumulative else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.batt_discharge_cumulative_growatt then r.batt_discharge_cumulative_growatt else 0.0)
  }))

title: Solar Monitor — Historical Graphs
